# Expected SHA-256 hashes for docker-compose files.
# Updated automatically when compose files change.
# Used by CI (compose-drift check) and deploy-prod.sh to detect silent drift.
docker-compose.prod.yml 1179b470a497a5777ab0083c137f25f5b5db58b31abafbefdcf5f65ffa10d529
docker-compose.n8n.yml 22ea41a382e0a4b14fb1accce1cd49594de6de6634165cbe51dc943751303bc5
